basic_details.job_title: National Book Trust Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Book Trust has published the Driver Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Driver position. Candidates within the maximum age limit of 45 years and holding a 10th Pass qualification along with a valid LTV/LMV driving license and minimum 15 years of driving experience are eligible to apply offline at National Book Trust Official Website. The application process will remain active until 25-05-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: Not exceeding 45 years as on the closing date of receipt of application. Age Relaxation: Relaxable by the Competent Authority on the basis of Skill/Experience.

qualification.details: Class 10th Pass (Matriculation) Must possess a valid Light Transport Vehicle (LTV) driving license. License must be renewed and active, with full authorization to operate Light Motor Vehicle (LMV). Must be medically and physically fit to operate light vehicles (no physical disabilities that would hinder safe driving). A minimum of 15 years of experience driving light vehicles on long-distance routes.

salary_details.details: Salary is negotiable as per the experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for National Book Trust Driver Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nbtindia.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the National Book Trust Driver post?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for the National Book Trust Driver post is 25th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Driver post is passing the 10th standard (Matriculation). Additionally, candidates must possess a valid Light Transport Vehicle (LTV) driving license and have significant driving experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Driver position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Driver position is not exceeding 45 years as on the closing date of receipt of the application. However, age relaxation may be provided by the Competent Authority based on skill and experience.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Driver post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Driver post in the National Book Trust. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and submit it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Driver post is negotiable as per the candidate's experience. This offers flexibility and ensures fair compensation based on skills and past performance.

faq.question: Q7. What are the essential documents required for the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates, including the driving license and proof of experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Driver recruitment will involve a Written Test/Skill Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the National Book Trust, which is www.nbtindia.gov.in. It is recommended to visit the website for the most up-to-date information.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for candidates with special skills or experience?
faq.answer: Yes, the age limit is relaxable by the Competent Authority on the basis of the candidate's skill and experience. This provision aims to encourage experienced individuals to apply.
